title: The Megillah Reading: What to Listen For on Purim
title_zh: 普珥节的书卷朗读：聆听要点
description: How to follow along during the Megillah reading, when to make noise at Haman's name, and the four special sections to focus on.
description_zh: 如何在书卷朗读期间跟随，何时在哈曼的名字时制造噪音，以及四个要关注的特殊段落。
description_he: כיצד לעקוב במהלך קריאת המגילה, מתי לעשות רעש לשם המן, וארבעת הקטעים המיוחדים להתמקד בהם.
chinese_historical_context: Spring and Autumn Period (春秋, ~770-476 BCE) - Contemporary with the Achaemenid Empire in Persia during the 5th century BCE when the events of the Megillah occurred
key_concepts: Making noise to blot out Haman's name
Four key passages in the Megillah
Hidden presence of God in the story
author: Torah Light Project
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no prior Jewish knowledge
